G3712.strongs_def: a stretch of the arms, i.e. a fathom

G3782.strongs_def: indebtedness, i.e. (concretely) a sum owed; figuratively, obligation, i.e. (conjugal) duty

G3779.strongs_def: in this way (referring to what precedes or follows)
G3779.kjv_def: after that, after (in) this manner, as, even (so), for all that, like(-wise), no more, on this fashion(-wise), so (in like manner), thus, what

G3717.derivation: probably from the base of G3735 (ὄρος);
G3717.strongs_def: right (as rising), i.e. (perpendicularly) erect (figuratively, honest), or (horizontally) level or direct

G3715.strongs_def: excitement of the mind, i.e. longing after

G3756.strongs_def: the absolute negative (compare G3361 (μή)) adverb; no or not
G3756.kjv_def: + long, nay, neither, never, no (X man), none, (can-)not, + nothing, + special, un(-worthy), when, + without, + yet but

G3724.strongs_def: to mark out or bound ("horizon"), i.e. (figuratively) to appoint, decree, specify

G3752.strongs_def: whenever (implying hypothesis or more or less uncertainty); also causatively (conjunctionally) inasmuch as
G3752.kjv_def: as long (soon) as, that, + till, when(-soever), while

G3768.kjv_def: hitherto not, (no…) as yet, not yet

G3781.strongs_def: an ower, i.e. person indebted; figuratively, a delinquent; morally, a transgressor (against God)

G3792.strongs_def: to make a crowd, i.e. raise a public disturbance

G3791.strongs_def: to mob, i.e. (by implication) to harass

G3738.derivation: middle voice from (a row or ring);
G3738.strongs_def: to dance (from the ranklike or regular motion)

G3703.derivation: apparently from the base of G3796 (ὀψέ) and G5610 (ὥρα);
G3703.strongs_def: properly, even-tide of the (summer) season (dog-days), i.e. (by implication) ripe fruit

G3755.derivation: for the genitive case of G3748 (ὅστις) (as adverb);
G3755.strongs_def: during which same time, i.e. whilst

G3784.derivation: probably from the base of G3786 (ὄφελος) (through the idea of accruing);
G3784.strongs_def: to owe (pecuniarily); figuratively, to be under obligation (ought, must, should); morally, to fail in duty
G3784.kjv_def: behove, be bound, (be) debt(-or), (be) due(-ty), be guilty (indebted), (must) need(-s), ought, owe, should

G3795.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of the base of G3702 (ὀπτός);
G3795.strongs_def: a relish to other food (as if cooked sauce), i.e. (specially), fish (presumably salted and dried as a condiment)

G3765.kjv_def: after that (not), (not) any more, henceforth (hereafter) not, no longer (more), not as yet (now), now no more (not), yet (not)

G3727.strongs_def: perhaps akin to G3725 (ὅριον)); a limit, i.e. (sacred) restraint (specially, an oath)

G3723.strongs_def: in a straight manner, i.e. (figuratively) correctly (also morally)

G3761.strongs_def: not however, i.e. neither, nor, not even
G3761.kjv_def: neither (indeed), never, no (more, nor, not), nor (yet), (also, even, then) not (even, so much as), + nothing, so much as

G3707.strongs_def: gazed at, i.e. (by implication) capable of being seen

G3763.strongs_def: not even at any time, i.e. never at all
G3763.kjv_def: neither at any time, never, nothing at any time

G3726.strongs_def: to put on oath, i.e. make swear; by analogy, to solemnly enjoin

G3732.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3733 (ὄρνις);

G3786.derivation: from (to heap up, i.e. accumulate or benefit);

G3789.derivation: probably from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) (through the idea of sharpness of vision);
G3789.strongs_def: a snake, figuratively, (as a type of sly cunning) an artful malicious person, especially Satan

G3713.derivation: middle voice of apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary (compare G3735 (ὄρος));
G3713.strongs_def: to stretch oneself, i.e. reach out after (long for)

G3718.derivation: from a compound of G3717 (ὀρθός) and the base of G5114 (τομώτερος), to make a straight cut, i.e. (figuratively) to dissect (expound) correctly (the divine message)

G3701.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι);

G3740.strongs_def: how (i.e. with G302 (ἄν), so) many times as

G3716.derivation: from a compound of G3717 (ὀρθός) and G4228 (πούς);
G3716.strongs_def: to be straight-footed, i.e. (figuratively) to go directly forward

G3798.strongs_def: late; feminine (as noun) afternoon (early eve) or nightfall (later eve)

G3777.strongs_def: not too, i.e. neither or nor; by analogy, not even
G3777.kjv_def: neither, none, nor (yet), (no, yet) not, nothing

G3753.kjv_def: after (that), as soon as, that, when, while

G3767.kjv_def: and (so, truly), but, now (then), so (likewise then), then, therefore, verily, wherefore
G3767.usage: therefore(263x), then(197x), so(18x), and(11x), now(9x), wherefore(8x), but(5x)

G3764.kjv_def: as yet not, never before (yet), (not) yet

G3772.derivation: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);
G3772.strongs_def: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)

G3733.derivation: probably from a prolonged form of the base of G3735 (ὄρος);
G3733.strongs_def: a bird (as rising in the air), i.e. (specially), a hen (or female domestic fowl)

G3766.strongs_def: is it not therefore that, i.e. (affirmatively) hence or so

G3757.derivation: genitive case of G3739 (ὅς) as adverb;

G3702.derivation: from an obsolete verb akin to (to "steep");

G3714.strongs_def: mountainous, i.e. (feminine by implication, of G5561 (χώρα)) the Highlands (of Judæa)

G3741.derivation: of uncertain affinity; properly, right (by intrinsic or divine character; thus distinguished from 1342, which refers rather to human statutes and relations; from G2413 (ἱερός), which denotes formal consecration;
G3741.strongs_def: and from G40 (ἅγιος), which relates to purity from defilement), i.e. hallowed (pious, sacred, sure)

G3771.derivation: from G3772 (οὐρανός) and the enclitic of source;

G3735.derivation: probably from an obsolete (to rise or "rear";
G3735.strongs_def: perhaps akin to G142 (αἴρω); compare G3733 (ὄρνις)); a mountain (as lifting itself above the plain)

G3793.derivation: from a derivative of G2192 (ἔχω) (meaning a vehicle);
G3793.strongs_def: a throng (as borne along); by implication, the rabble; by extension, a class of people; figuratively, a riot
G3793.kjv_def: company, multitude, number (of people), people, press

G3783.strongs_def: something owed, i.e. (figuratively) a due; morally, a fault

G3706.strongs_def: the act of gazing, i.e. (externally) an aspect or (internally) an inspired appearance

G3704.strongs_def: what(-ever) how, i.e. in the manner that (as adverb or conjunction of coincidence, intentional or actual)

G3739.derivation: probably a primary word (or perhaps a form of the article G3588 (ὁ));
G3739.strongs_def: the relatively (sometimes demonstrative) pronoun, who, which, what, that
G3739.kjv_def: one, (an-, the) other, some, that, what, which, who(-m, -se), etc
G3739.usage: which(418x), whom(270x), that(139x), who(87x), whose(52x), what(40x), whereof(17x)

G3720.strongs_def: relating to the dawn, i.e. matutinal (as an epithet of Venus, especially brilliant in the early day)

G3736.strongs_def: to "burrow" in the ground, i.e. dig

G3794.derivation: from a remote derivative of G2192 (ἔχω) (meaning to fortify, through the idea of holding safely);

G3700.derivation: a (middle voice) prolonged form of the primary (middle voice) ; which is used for it in certain tenses; and both as alternate of G3708 (ὁράω);
G3700.strongs_def: to gaze (i.e. with wide-open eyes, as at something remarkable; and thus differing from G991 (βλέπω), which denotes simply voluntary observation; and from G1492 (εἴδω), which expresses merely mechanical, passive or casual vision; while G2300 (θεάομαι), and still more emphatically its intensive G2334 (θεωρέω), signifies an earnest but more continued inspection; and G4648 (σκοπέω) a watching from a distance)

G3799.strongs_def: properly, sight (the act), i.e. (by implication) the visage, an external show

G3790.derivation: perhaps from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) (through the idea of the shading or proximity to the organ of vision);
G3790.strongs_def: the eye-"brow" or forehead, i.e. (figuratively) the brink of a precipice

G3734.derivation: from a compound of the base of G3725 (ὅριον) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);

G3748.strongs_def: which some, i.e. any that; also (definite) which same
G3748.kjv_def: X and (they), (such) as, (they) that, in that they, what(-soever), whereas ye, (they) which, who(-soever)

G3770.strongs_def: celestial, i.e. belonging to or coming from the sky

G3778.derivation: from the article G3588 (ὁ) and G846 (αὐτός);
G3778.strongs_def: the he (she or it), i.e. this or that (often with article repeated)
G3778.kjv_def: he (it was that), hereof, it, she, such as, the same, these, they, this (man, same, woman), which, who

G3751.strongs_def: the loin (externally), i.e. the hip; internally (by extension) procreative power

G3745.kjv_def: all (that), as (long, many, much) (as), how great (many, much), (in-)asmuch as, so many as, that (ever), the more, those things, what (great, -soever), wheresoever, wherewithsoever, which, X while, who(-soever)

G3709.strongs_def: properly, desire (as a reaching forth or excitement of the mind), i.e. (by analogy), violent passion (ire, or (justifiable) abhorrence); by implication punishment

G3719.strongs_def: to use the dawn, i.e. (by implication) to repair betimes

G3754.kjv_def: as concerning that, as though, because (that), for (that), how (that), (in) that, though, why

G3722.strongs_def: dawn (as sun-rise, rising of light); by extension, morn

G3796.derivation: from the same as G3694 (ὀπίσω) (through the idea of backwardness);
G3796.strongs_def: (adverbially) late in the day; by extension, after the close of the day

G3785.derivation: first person singular of a past tense of G3784 (ὀφείλω);

G3721.strongs_def: in the dawn, i.e. up at day-break

G3762.strongs_def: not even one (man, woman or thing), i.e. none, nobody, nothing
G3762.kjv_def: any (man), aught, man, neither any (thing), never (man), no (man), none (+ of these things), not (any, at all, -thing), nought

G3749.strongs_def: earthen-ware, i.e. clayey; by implication, frail

G3725.derivation: neuter of a derivative of an apparently primary (a bound or limit);
G3725.strongs_def: a boundary-line, i.e. (by implication) a frontier (region)

G3729.strongs_def: to start, spur or urge on, i.e. (reflexively) to dash or plunge

G3708.derivation: properly, to stare at (compare G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)), i.e. (by implication) to discern clearly (physically or mentally);
G3708.strongs_def: by extension, to attend to; by Hebraism, to experience; passively, to appear

G3705.strongs_def: something gazed at, i.e. a spectacle (especially supernatural)

G3728.derivation: from a compound of G3727 (ὅρκος) and a derivative of G3660 (ὀμνύω);

G3710.strongs_def: to provoke or enrage, i.e. (passively) become exasperated

G3788.strongs_def: the eye (literally or figuratively); by implication, vision; figuratively, envy (from the jealous side-glance)
